name: Fruity Buckwheat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, apples, buckwheat flour, sugar, dates, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. In another bowl, combine the buttermilk, oil, and egg. Add this to the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
4. Divide the batter evenly among muffin cups coated with cooking spray.
5. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes. Remove from the pan immediately.
6. Let cool on wire racks. Makes 12 muffins.
